revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Mandatory Palestine]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Mandatory Palestine]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23359502324|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23931424921|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Mandatory Palestine | shortname alias = Palestine | flag alias = Flag of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-maritime = Ensign of the Palestine Mandate (1927–1948).svg | flag alias-football = Ensign of the Palestine Mandate (1927–1948).svg | link alias-football = Mandatory Palestine national football team | name alias-football = {{#ifeq:{{Str find|{{PAGENAME}}|FIFA}}|-1|Mandatory Palestine|Palestine, British Mandate}} | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = maritime | redir1 = PAL | related1 = Israel | related4 = Palestine | related6 = Gaza Strip | cat = Palestine mandatory </noinclude> }}
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude></noinclude> \n [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Mandatory_Palestine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Mandatory_Palestine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}}
| alias = Mandatory Palestine
| shortname alias = Palestine
| flag alias = Flag of the United Kingdom.svg
| flag alias-maritime = Ensign of the Palestine Mandate (1927–1948).svg
| flag alias-football = Ensign of the Palestine Mandate (1927–1948).svg
| link alias-football = Mandatory Palestine national football team
| name alias-football = {{#ifeq:{{Str find|{{PAGENAME}}|FIFA}}|-1|Mandatory Palestine|Palestine, British Mandate}}
| size = {{{size|}}}
| name = {{{name|}}}
| variant = {{{variant|}}}
| altlink = {{{altlink|}}}
| altvar = {{{altvar|}}}
<noinclude>
| var1 = maritime
| redir1 = PAL
| related1 = Israel
| related4 = Palestine 
| related6 = Gaza Strip
| cat = Palestine mandatory
</noinclude>
}}

<noinclude>
<noinclude>\n<noinclude></noinclude>
\n
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
